'''Igaka''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The freighter was delivering supplies and repairs to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Juvaini]]'' just as [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] arrived to destroy the frigate.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Star_Wars:_X-Wing#Easter_eggs|Like many of the freighter names in X-Wing]], it is a real-life name spelled in reverse. [[Wikipedia:Japanese_aircraft_carrier_Akagi|Akagi]] was the name of a Japanese aircraft carrier during World War II. It may also refer to [[Wikipedia:Akagi|others uses of the name Akagi]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
